user.title: Set up Jura Connect
user.description: How would you like to find your coffee machine?

no_machines_found.title: No machines found
no_machines_found.description: No Jura coffee machines were detected on your network. Make sure the machine is powered on and connected to the same WiFi as Home Assistant. Click Submit to enter the IP address manually.

select.title: Choose a machine
select.description: These machines were detected on your network:

manual.title: Manual setup
manual.description: Enter your coffee machine's IP address. The WiFi dongle listens on TCP port 51515 by default. Leave PIN empty unless you set one on the machine.

pair_failed.title: Pairing failed

machine_type.title: Choose your Jura model
machine_type.description:
Selecting the correct model lets Home Assistant name brew counters and status alerts using your machine's own product table. Auto-detected: {detected}.

Leave it on "Use baseline (no profile)" if your machine isn't in the list — the integration will fall back to a generic EF536 mapping.

progress.discovering: Searching for Jura coffee machines on your network. This takes up to 5 seconds.
progress.pairing:
Connecting to {host}.

Walk to your coffee machine — it should be showing a "Connect" prompt. Press OK on the machine display to accept this connection.

Waiting up to 60 seconds.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the machine. Verify it's powered on, on the same network, and that the IP address is correct.
error.pairing_timeout: The machine did not accept the connection within 60 seconds. Make sure to press OK on the coffee machine's display when prompted, then try again.
error.pairing_aborted: The pairing was rejected on the machine (you pressed Cancel, or the Connect dialog timed out). Try again and press OK on the machine.
error.pairing_rejected: The machine refused the pairing request. This usually means the Connect dialog never appeared — check that the machine is powered on and reachable.
error.wrong_pin: The machine requires a PIN, or the PIN you provided is wrong. Go back to manual setup and enter the correct PIN.
error.wrong_hash: The stored credentials are no longer valid. Remove and re-add the integration to re-pair.
